zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Condet於1160年出生在英國林可爾史爾格倫塔姆時，她的父親Roger de Cundy Lord of Coventry22歲，母親Alice de Cheney28歲。她於1185年與Walter de Clifford II在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年12月23日在英國賀福爾享年103歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Condet于1160年出生在英国林可爾史爾格倫塔姆时，她的父亲Roger de Cundy Lord of Coventry22岁，母亲Alice de Cheney28岁。她于1185年与Walter de Clifford II在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年12月23日在英国賀福爾享年103岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Condet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Condover (Shropshire), earlier recorded as Conedovre and Conedor'.
English: in northern England perhaps a variant of Connor with intrusive -d-.
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Kanter   or   Ganter  .

variants.name: Condor
meanings: Altered form of Hungarian   Kondor  . This form of the surname is also found in Romania.
Amerindian and Spanish (Cóndor): from cóndor, a word of Quechuan origin, documented in Spain since the 16th century.

variants.name: Connor
meanings: Irish and Manx: shortened form of O'Connor , which is an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Conchobhair ‘descendant of Conchobhar’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Condet was born in 1160, in Glentham, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Roger de Cundy Lord of Coventry, was 22 and her mother, Alice de Cheney, was 28. She married Walter de Clifford II in 1185, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 23 December 1263, in Herefordshire, England, at the age of 103, and was buried in Herefordshire, England.

Elle a épousé Walter de Clifford II en 1185, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 décembre 1263, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 103 ans, et a été enterrée à Herefordshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Condet è nata il nel 1160 nel Glentham, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Roger de Cundy Lord of Coventry, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Alice de Cheney, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Walter de Clifford II nel 1185, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 dicembre 1263, nel Herefordshire, England, all'età di 103 anni, e fu sepolta a Herefordshire, England.

ko.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Condet(이)가 1160년 영국 링코실르 글렌섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Cundy Lord of Coventry(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Cheney(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Walter de Clifford II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 12월 23일 영국 허퍼드실르에서 103세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Walter de Clifford II em 1185, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Condet родилась в 1160 г. в местности глентам, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Cundy Lord of Coventry было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Cheney, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Clifford II в 1185 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 23 декабря 1263 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 103 лет и была похоронена в местности хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Condet nació en 1160, en Glentham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Cundy Lord of Coventry, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alice de Cheney, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Walter de Clifford II en 1185, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de diciembre de 1263, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 103 años, y fue sepultada en Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
